Variables.Name: ObjectName
Variables.Description: The widget that will be bound to the live data.

Variables.Name: PropertyName
Variables.Description: The property on the widget that will have a binding placed on it.

Variables.Name: FunctionName
Variables.Description: The function or property we're binding to on the source object.

Variables.Name: Kind
Variables.Description: The kind of binding we're performing, are we binding to a property or a function.
